S.FORM: === An-ta-man-subal ÂÆâÈÅîÊõºÁæ§Â≥∂Âéü‰ΩèÊ∞ë === ayda idaw ku sepatay nu binacadan, Taan-taman-zen "Strait Island", Ciwluo-wa-zen, Wunci-zen atu Santi-neie-zen. Anta-man subalan a mapuletay nu lumeniay a tademaw caay tu pikihatiya tu kitakid, kaisa atu i hekalay atademaw masasuadih. picidekan tu Santi-neie-zen mikitalakaw tu duma a kitidaan nu tademaw, palecad tu talakaw han makaala tu caynem-sep ‚Äì caynem-lim kunhu ku talakaw, caay kaw apulet ku sausi tu nuhenian " mapuletay han a caylim-sep kunhun", nipisausi ayda nu maudipay cacay tu a malebut ku maudipay. Ciwluo-wa a binacadan tulim-sep ‚Äì sipsep-sep ku tademaw. ÁõÆÂâçÊúâ4Êóè: 250-400‰∫∫.
S.PHON: === an-ta-man-subar~…æ ******** === ajda idaw ku s…ôpataj nu bina ¶adan, taan-taman-z…ôn "strait isr~…æand", ¶iwr~…æuo-wa-z…ôn, wun ¶i-z…ôn atu santi-n…ôi…ô-z…ôn. anta-man subar~…æan a mapur~…æ…ôtaj nu r~…æum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw ¶aaj tu pikiƒßatija tu kitakid, kaisa atu i ƒß…ôkar~…æaj atad…ômaw masasuadiƒß. pi ¶id…ôkan tu santi-n…ôi…ô-z…ôn mikitar~…æakaw tu duma a kitidaan nu tad…ômaw, par~…æ…ô ¶ad tu tar~…æakaw ƒßan makaar~…æa tu ¶ajn…ôm-s…ôp * ¶ajn…ôm-r~…æim kunƒßu ku tar~…æakaw, ¶aaj kaw apur~…æ…ôt ku sausi tu nuƒß…ônian " mapur~…æ…ôtaj ƒßan a ¶ajr~…æim-s…ôp kunƒßun", nipisausi ajda nu maudipaj ¶a ¶aj tu a mar~…æ…ôbut ku maudipaj. ¶iwr~…æuo-wa a bina ¶adan tur~…æim-s…ôp * sips…ôp-s…ôp ku tad…ômaw. *****: ***-****.
S.FORM: === An-ta-man-subal ÂÆâÈÅîÊõºÁæ§Â≥∂Âéü‰ΩèÊ∞ë === ayda idaw ku sepatay nu binacadan, Taan-taman-zen "Strait Island", Ciwluo-wa-zen, Wunci-zen atu Santi-neie-zen. Anta-man subalan a mapuletay nu lumeniay a tademaw caay tu pikihatiya tu kitakid, kaisa atu i hekalay atademaw masasuadih. picidekan tu Santi-neie-zen mikitalakaw tu duma a kitidaan nu tademaw, palecad tu talakaw han makaala tu caynem-sep ‚Äì caynem-lim kunhu ku talakaw, caay kaw apulet ku sausi tu nuhenian " mapuletay han a caylim-sep kunhun", nipisausi ayda nu maudipay cacay tu a malebut ku maudipay. Ciwluo-wa a binacadan tulim-sep ‚Äì sipsep-sep ku tademaw. ÁõÆÂâçÊúâ4Êóè: 250-400‰∫∫.
S.PHON: === an-ta-man-subar~…æ ******** === ajda idaw ku s…ôpataj nu bina ¶adan, taan-taman-z…ôn "strait isr~…æand", ¶iwr~…æuo-wa-z…ôn, wun ¶i-z…ôn atu santi-n…ôi…ô-z…ôn. anta-man subar~…æan a mapur~…æ…ôtaj nu r~…æum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw ¶aaj tu pikiƒßatija tu kitakid, kaisa atu i ƒß…ôkar~…æaj atad…ômaw masasuadiƒß. pi ¶id…ôkan tu santi-n…ôi…ô-z…ôn mikitar~…æakaw tu duma a kitidaan nu tad…ômaw, par~…æ…ô ¶ad tu tar~…æakaw ƒßan makaar~…æa tu ¶ajn…ôm-s…ôp * ¶ajn…ôm-r~…æim kunƒßu ku tar~…æakaw, ¶aaj kaw apur~…æ…ôt ku sausi tu nuƒß…ônian " mapur~…æ…ôtaj ƒßan a ¶ajr~…æim-s…ôp kunƒßun", nipisausi ajda nu maudipaj ¶a ¶aj tu a mar~…æ…ôbut ku maudipaj. ¶iwr~…æuo-wa a bina ¶adan tur~…æim-s…ôp * sips…ôp-s…ôp ku tad…ômaw. *****: ***-****.
